// Fixture file for the stub-markers rule.
// Stored as .txt so the audit's own scan does not pick it up as a real source file.

export function fetchUser(id: string) {
  // TODO: implement caching
  // FIXME: handle 404 properly
  return getUserFromDb(id);
}

export function calculateRefund() {
  throw new Error("not implemented");
}

declare function getUserFromDb(id: string): unknown;
